title: N-PAMP Channel Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/channels.csv: an array of row objects, one per registered channel. The CI check converts the CSV to this array (header row -> object keys) before validating. Format/required/enum defects (wrong-format channel_id, missing column, out-of-enum min_profile or direction) are caught here; DUPLICATE channel_id values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py (JSON Schema cannot assert single-field uniqueness across rows).

channel_id.description: 16-bit channel identifier, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x0000).

purpose.description: One-line purpose of the channel; MUST be non-empty.

min_profile.description: Minimum negotiated profile required to open this channel.

direction.description: Directionality / multiplexing mode of the channel.
